tools.name: x07.search_v1
tools.description: Token-efficient search across x07 resources + local docs/skills (and optional cached remote indices).

tools.name: x07.resource_snippet_v1
tools.description: Return a bounded UTF-8 window from a resource body (by uri).

tools.name: x07.doc_v1
tools.description: Run `x07 doc` and return a compact summary.

tools.name: x07.cli.describe_v1
tools.description: Filtered lookup over `x07 --cli-specrows` (cached).

tools.name: x07.exec_v1
tools.description: Run a bounded x07 invocation (no network). Prefer dedicated tools when available.

args.description: Preferred x07 argument list without the leading x07 binary name. If both args and argv are present, args is used.

argv.description: Compatibility argv form. The leading x07 entry is optional and ignored when present. Used only when args is absent.

tools.name: x07.patch_apply_v1
tools.description: Apply an x07.patchset@0.1.0 to a repo root (deterministic JSON Patch).

tools.name: x07.fmt_write_v1
tools.description: Format x07AST JSON files in-place via `x07 fmt --write`.

path.description: Single input file. Used only when paths is absent or empty.

paths.description: Multiple input files. Takes precedence over path when present.

tools.name: x07.lint_report_v1
tools.description: Run `x07 lint` and write a JSON report to report_path.

tools.name: x07.context_pack_v1
tools.description: Generate a bounded, token-efficient agent context pack from a diagnostics report.

tools.name: x07.artifact_snippet_v1
tools.description: Read a bounded window of a file (repo-relative); optionally extract a JSON Pointer subvalue.

tools.name: x07.ecosystem.status_v1
tools.description: Report installed X07 ecosystem binaries, enabled packs, and workspace signals with bounded output.

tools.name: x07.pkg.provides_v1
tools.description: Resolve an X07 module id to the package(s) that provide it via `x07 pkg provides`.

tools.name: x07.pkg.tree_v1
tools.description: Print a deterministic dependency-closure graph via `x07 pkg tree`.

tools.name: x07.pkg.verify_v1
tools.description: Verify a package signature via `x07 pkg verify`.

tools.name: x07.pkg.check_semver_v1
tools.description: Detect breaking export changes via `x07 pkg check-semver`.

tools.name: x07.pkg.catalog_v1
tools.description: Query cached or refreshed X07 package catalogs from the registry and agent portal with cursor pagination.

tools.name: x07.wasm.core_v1
tools.description: Run core X07 WASM and component operations with bounded outputs and file-backed reports.

tools.name: x07.web_ui.exec_v1
tools.description: Run X07 web-ui validate/build/serve/test/regress operations with bounded outputs.

tools.name: x07.device.exec_v1
tools.description: Run X07 device build/verify/run/package/provenance operations with bounded outputs.

tools.name: x07.app.exec_v1
tools.description: Run X07 app contracts/profile/build/serve/test/regress operations with bounded outputs.

tools.name: x07.service.init_v1
tools.description: Initialize a service-oriented X07 project skeleton in the selected working directory.

tools.name: x07.service.archetypes_v1
tools.description: List built-in service archetypes and their package defaults.

tools.name: x07.service.genpack.schema_v1
tools.description: Emit the archetype-specific service Genpack JSON Schema.

tools.name: x07.service.genpack.grammar_v1
tools.description: Emit the archetype-specific service Genpack grammar.

tools.name: x07.service.validate_v1
tools.description: Validate an X07 service manifest through the canonical x07 CLI.

tools.name: x07.workload.inspect_v1
tools.description: Inspect the current workload artifact view through x07-wasm.

tools.name: x07.topology.preview_v1
tools.description: Preview the current service topology grouping through x07-wasm.

tools.name: lp.release.submit_v1
tools.description: Submit a hosted release candidate through the canonical x07lp CLI and return the durable release_id used by the hosted review flow.

tools.name: lp.release.query_v1
tools.description: Query a hosted release summary or evidence bundle through x07lp using the durable release_id returned at submit time.

tools.name: lp.release.explain_v1
tools.description: Fetch the hosted review and decision bundle for a durable release_id, including binding, target, and policy-facing diagnostics surfaced by x07lp.

tools.name: lp.release.rollback_v1
tools.description: Roll back a hosted release through x07lp using its durable release_id and return the latest rollback decision diagnostics.

tools.name: lp.binding.status_v1
tools.description: Inspect hosted binding inventory or a single durable binding id through x07lp and surface the public binding diagnostics used by the hosted control plane.

tools.name: lp.rollout.list_v1
tools.description: List rollouts for an environment with bounded filters (read-only).

tools.name: lp.rollout.status_v1
tools.description: Fetch rollout status by rollout_id (read-only).

tools.name: lp.rollout.start_v1
tools.description: Start a rollout for an existing deployment with confirm + dry-run guardrails.

tools.name: lp.rollout.pause_v1
tools.description: Pause a rollout with an audit-friendly reason.

tools.name: lp.rollout.promote_v1
tools.description: Promote (resume) a paused rollout with an audit-friendly reason.

tools.name: lp.rollout.abort_v1
tools.description: Abort (stop) a rollout with an audit-friendly reason.

tools.name: lp.rollout.rollback_v1
tools.description: Rollback a rollout with guardrails (confirm phrase + reason).

tools.name: lp.slo.snapshot.latest_v1
tools.description: Fetch the latest SLO snapshot for a deployment (read-only).

tools.name: lp.slo.snapshot.list_v1
tools.description: List recent SLO snapshots for a deployment (read-only).

tools.name: lp.query_v1
tools.description: Query platform targets, deployments, incidents, and app inventory with bounded outputs.

tools.name: lp.control_v1
tools.description: Run platform lifecycle control operations with bounded outputs and audit-friendly file-backed reports.
